common.swipeHint: Swipe right to select, left to see next, or up for more info
common.reviewAgain: Please review options again to make your selection

intro.welcome: Welcome to Ellie! I'm here to help you set up your shift calendar. Let's start by getting to know you a bit better.
intro.askOccupation: Great to meet you, {{name}}! What's your occupation?
intro.askCompany: Got it! Which company do you work for?
intro.askCountry: Almost done! Which country are you based in?
intro.allSet: Perfect! You're all set, {{name}}. Let's get your shift calendar configured.

editResponse.title: Edit Response
editResponse.message: Edit your response. The conversation will rewind from this point.

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.nameInvalidChars: Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes
errors.countryTooShort: Country must be at least 2 characters

shiftSystem.title: How Many Shifts Does Your Site Run?
shiftSystem.reviewAgain: Please review systems again to make your selection
shiftSystem.instruction:
Select how your site operates—we'll build your calendar from this
Swipe right to choose, left to see more, up for info

endState.selectedTitle: Got it! We'll set up your calendar for this.
endState.selectedSubtitle: Next, we'll pick your specific rotation pattern

2-shift.title: 2 Shifts (12 hours)
2-shift.description: Your workplace runs two 12-hour shifts—one during the day, one at night

3-shift.title: 3 Shifts (8 hours)
3-shift.description: Your workplace runs three 8-hour shifts—morning, afternoon, and night

shiftPattern.reviewAgain: Please review patterns again to make your selection

rosterType.title: How Does Your Roster Work?
rosterType.instruction:
Choose the roster style your workplace uses — this shapes your entire schedule
Swipe right to choose, left to see more, up for details

rotating.title: Rotating Roster
rotating.subtitle: Days → Nights → Off pattern
rotating.description: You rotate through different shift times in a repeating cycle

details.howItWorks: Workers rotate through different shift times (day shifts, night shifts, days off) in a continuous cycle

fifo.title: FIFO / Swing Roster
fifo.subtitle: Work blocks → Home blocks
fifo.description: You work consecutive days on-site, then get extended time at home

details.howItWorks: Workers fly in to remote sites, work consecutive days (work block), then fly home for extended rest (rest block)
cons: Away from family for extended periods

completion.saveFailed: Failed to save your data. Please try again.

features.remindersDesc: Never miss a shift with intelligent notifications that adapt to your rotation
features.sleepDesc: Optimize your rest between shifts with personalized sleep analytics
features.fatigueDesc: Track your energy levels and get alerts when fatigue risk is high
features.teamDesc: See your crew schedule and coordinate handovers seamlessly
features.balanceDesc: Maintain healthy routines with activity and wellness tracking
features.earningsDesc: Automatically calculate overtime, penalties, and shift allowances
features.mealsDesc: Stay healthy with meal timing suggestions and hydration reminders

title.workPattern: How are shifts run during your FIFO work block?
title.block: Where are you in your FIFO cycle?
title.dayWithinBlock: Which day of {{blockTitle}} are you on?

subtitle.workPattern: Swipe right to choose your work-block pattern, left for next option, or up for info
subtitle.swingConfig: Set how many day-shift and night-shift days you work before choosing your current block
subtitle.block: Swipe right to select, left to see next, or up for more info
subtitle.dayWithinBlock: Swipe right to select, left to see next, or up for more info. Is it the {{ordinalList}}?

straightDays.title: Straight Days
straightDays.description: Your work block runs day shifts only.
straightDays.quickInfo: Best for operations that keep all crews on daytime rotations.

straightNights.title: Straight Nights
straightNights.description: Your work block runs night shifts only.
straightNights.quickInfo: Use this when site crews remain on night shifts for the full work block.

swing.title: Swing
swing.description: Your work block mixes day and night shifts.
swing.quickInfo: Choose this when your work block rotates between days and nights.

work.title: At Site (Working)
work.descriptionDay: You are currently at the mine site on your day-shift work block
work.descriptionNight: You are currently at the mine site on your night-shift work block
work.descriptionNeutral: You are currently at the mine site on your work block
work.quickInfoDay: This means your cycle starts counting from your day-shift work block.
work.quickInfoNight: This means your cycle starts counting from your night-shift work block.
work.quickInfoNeutral: This means your cycle starts counting from your current work block.

rest.title: At Home (Rest)
rest.description: You are currently at home on your rest block
rest.quickInfo: This offsets your cycle by your work block length first.

swingConfig.validation: Swing split must equal {{workBlockDays}} days with at least 1 day on each shift.

work.firstNightAtSite: First night shift back at site
work.lastNightBeforeHome: Last night shift before flying home
work.shiftOfNightBlock: Shift {{dayNumber}} of your night work block

rest.lastDayBeforeSite: Last day before returning to site

swing.firstDayShiftAtSite: First day shift back at site
swing.finalDayShiftBeforeNights: Final day shift before switching to nights
swing.dayShiftDayDescription: Day shift day {{dayNumber}} of your work block
swing.firstNightShiftInBlock: First night shift in this swing block
swing.finalNightShiftBeforeHome: Final night shift before flying home
swing.nightShiftDayDescription: Night shift day {{dayNumber}} of your work block

header.title: When Does Your Rotation Start?
header.subtitleWithPhase: You're on {{phaseLabel}} right now—pick today or any date, and we'll map out your whole calendar from there
header.subtitleDefault: Pick the date you want your calendar to start from—most people choose today

guidance.title: Picking your date
guidance.subtitle: Quick tips for a faster setup
guidance.body: Most people pick today so their calendar starts right away. But you can pick any date—we'll calculate your rotation from there.
guidance.hint: Pick the closest date now, you can adjust settings later.

actions.saveAndReturnToSettings: Save start date and return to settings

actions.saveAndReturnA11y: Save shift time and return to settings

subtitle.single: Pick what time you clock in each day-we'll use this to track your hours and set reminders
subtitle.multi: Your pattern includes {{shiftTypeLabel}}. Set the start time for these shifts.

guidance.aboutBody: Your {{patternName}} rotation stays the same, but we need your shift start times so Ellie can track hours and alert you before each shift.
guidance.hint: Use the closest start time now. You can fine-tune it later in settings.

definitions.twoShiftBody: Day shifts start 6 AM-6 PM - Night shifts start 6 PM-6 AM
definitions.threeShiftBody: Morning: 6 AM-2 PM - Afternoon: 2 PM-10 PM - Night: 10 PM-6 AM

customInput.label: What time do you usually clock in?

detection.helper: This is when your shift begins

tips.title: Pro Tip
tips.subtitle: Fastest way to pick a reliable start time
tips.twoShift: Not sure? Most shift workers on 12-hour rotations start at 6 AM or 6 PM. Pick the closest match-you can adjust it later in settings if needed.
tips.threeShift: Not sure? Most 8-hour shift workers start at 6 AM, 2 PM, or 10 PM. Pick the closest match-you can adjust it later in settings if needed.
